name: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc.
business: ConnectOne Bancorp, Inc. operates primarily through its bank subsidiary, ConnectOne Bank, offering deposit and loan products and services to small and mid-sized businesses, local professionals, and individuals in the New York Metropolitan area and Florida. It also has a fintech subsidiary, BoeFly, which provides a marketplace for franchise financing.
sellsTo: individuals residing, working and conducting business in the New York Metropolitan area and the Florida market

exposures.sentence: BoeFly is the Bank’s business-to-business fintech subsidiary, providing a marketplace that connects franchisors, franchisees, and lenders.
The development and use of artificial intelligence (AI) present risks and challenges that may adversely impact our business.

catalysts.event: Contractual repricing of approximately $2.4 billion in loans originated in 2021-2022
catalysts.sentence: A significant portion of our loan portfolio, approximately $2.4 billion, primarily originated during the low-interest-rate environment of 2021 and 2022, is scheduled to contractually reprice during 2026 and 2027.
